title: Fix labs navbar width and pinning

log.context: Fix labs navbar width and pinning

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**Root cause:** `sitenav.css` used `position: sticky` which relies on the nav being in normal document flow — fine on the main site but unreliable on labs pages with their own body layouts. No `width: 100%` guarantee either.

**Changes made:**

1. `/mnt/data/hello-world/sitenav.css` — Changed `.sitenav` from `position: sticky` to `position: fixed; left: 0; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 9999`

2. `/mnt/data/hello-world/sitenav.js` — Add...(truncated)
